questions.question: Solution: Use notebookutils.credentials.getSecret and specify the key vault URL and the name of a linked service. Does this meet the goal?

You have two Fabric notebooks named Load_Salesperson and Load_Orders that read data from Parquet files and write to Delta tables. Load_Orders depends on the successful execution of Load_Salesperson. You need to dynamically execute the notebooks in the correct order using a notebook DAG.
You are building a data pipeline named Dynamic Data Copy. The pipeline must receive a list of tables to copy using a ForEach activity. Complete the pipeline expression.
You must configure dynamic data masking in a Fabric warehouse so that BirthDate displays 1900-01-01 and EmailAddress only shows the first and last characters.
You have a Fabric workspace containing Report1, Dashboard1, Model1 and Lakehouse1. Which items can be endorsed in Fabric?
You configure source control for a Fabric workspace using GitHub. Which permissions are required to commit code while following least privilege?

options.A: Actions (Read and write) and Contents (Read and write)
options.D: Contents (Read) and Commit statuses (Read and write)

questions.question: You configure Git integration for a Fabric workspace using an Azure DevOps Git repository. Which details are required for the integration?
You must run a notebook daily at 07:00 UTC, retry twice if it fails, and refresh a semantic model after the notebook completes successfully. Which three actions should you perform?

options.A: Link refresh activity using On success
options.B: Set pipeline schedule timezone to UTC
options.D: Set notebook schedule timezone to UTC
